description_long: This is a modern rectangular bathroom sink with a built-in vanity cabinet. The basin is made of smooth white ceramic or composite material, featuring a gently sloped interior and a single faucet mounted at the rear center. The vanity cabinet below is finished in a light wood grain, with a wide front panel and two side panels, providing a clean and minimalist appearance. The plumbing and drain pipes are visible when viewed from the rear, with cutouts in the internal drawers to accommodate the piping. The sink includes a single drain located at the rear of the basin and a faucet with a lever handle. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban bathrooms or public washrooms.
description: A modern rectangular white sink with a light wood grain vanity cabinet, single rear drain, and a central faucet. The design is sleek, minimalist, and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the white basin and the vertical wood grain panel of the vanity.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flat basin, central faucet, and the full-width wood grain cabinet panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with the faucet and basin profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the internal plumbing, cutout drawers, and the back of the basin.
